title: peltophorum dasyrhachis
intro: Peltophorum dasyrhachis, also known as the Golden Rain Tree, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and small, flat pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peltophorum dasyrhachis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
